scorecard.numbers: 100% of $29,090 staked one direction (YES), 86% in a single event cluster — the un-hedged, single-thesis concentration of someone betting what they already know.

scorecard.formula: winning long-shots bought within hours of resolution
scorecard.numbers: 2 of 2 winning long-shots were bought within 72h of resolution (soonest 9h before) — entering a ~11% outcome right before it happened is the informed-entry signature.

subjects.confidenceLimiter: the binomial test assumes each bet is an independent event; correlated events are de-correlated before scoring

subjects.heroSentence: This account placed a single $10K bet at roughly 12 percent on “maduro-out-in-2025” and cashed out about $82K. One bet is not statistically improbable on its own — but a lone, outsized, high-conviction long-shot like this, alongside the other signals, is the single-bet insider signature. Consistent with informed trading, not proof of it.

scorecard.formula: age = first bet block − funding block
scorecard.numbers: Account first bet ~0h after funding, with no prior transactions — a purpose-built wallet.

scorecard.formula: average of the market's odds at entry
scorecard.numbers: Average entry odds ~7% across 2 bets — concentrated in long shots (≤20%).

scorecard.formula: one large long-shot win held to resolution
